name: Air Squat
coachingCue: Chest up, knees tracking toes, hit parallel.

name: Jump Squat
coachingCue: Land soft, absorb through hips and knees.

name: Goblet Squat
coachingCue: Elbows inside knees at bottom, tall chest.

name: Dumbbell Front Squat
coachingCue: DBs on shoulders, elbows high.

name: Front Squat
coachingCue: Elbows high, rack position tight, vertical torso.

name: Back Squat
coachingCue: Bar on shelf, brace core, drive knees out.

name: Wall Ball
coachingCue: Hit parallel, explosive hip drive, aim above target line.

name: Overhead Squat
coachingCue: Active shoulders, bar over mid-foot, wide grip.

name: Pistol Squat
coachingCue: Heel down, non-working leg extended forward.

name: Deadlift
coachingCue: Hinge at hips, neutral spine, bar over mid-foot.

name: Dumbbell Deadlift
coachingCue: DBs close to legs, flat back, push floor away.

name: Kettlebell Deadlift
coachingCue: KB between feet, hinge back, proud chest.

name: Kettlebell Swing
coachingCue: Hinge hard, snap hips, KB floats to chest height.

name: American Kettlebell Swing
coachingCue: Full hip extension, KB overhead, active shoulders.

name: Good Morning
coachingCue: Soft knee, hinge until torso near parallel, neutral spine.

name: Romanian Deadlift
coachingCue: Bar stays close, feel hamstring stretch, hip hinge.

name: Push-Up
coachingCue: Rigid plank, elbows back at 45°, full lockout.

name: Knee Push-Up
coachingCue: Straight line from knees to shoulders, full range.

name: Pike Push-Up
coachingCue: Hips high, head through at bottom, pressing up and back.

name: Handstand Push-Up
coachingCue: Tripod base against wall, head touches first, press to full lockout.

name: Strict Press
coachingCue: Elbows in front of bar, press vertically, finish with shrug.

name: Push Press
coachingCue: Dip-drive-press: vertical dip, explosive leg drive, lock out.

name: Dumbbell Push Press
coachingCue: DBs at shoulders, dip shallow, press overhead fast.

name: Dumbbell Strict Press
coachingCue: No leg drive, press straight up, full lock out.

name: Thruster
coachingCue: Front squat into push press — one fluid motion, no pause.

name: Dumbbell Thruster
coachingCue: DBs at shoulders, squat deep, drive up and press.

name: Pull-Up
coachingCue: Dead hang start, chin clears bar, controlled descent.

name: Chest-to-Bar Pull-Up
coachingCue: Chest touches bar, full hip extension at bottom.

name: Muscle-Up
coachingCue: Aggressive kip, early transition, lock out at top.

name: Ring Row
coachingCue: Rigid body, pull rings to chest, squeeze at top.

name: Toes-to-Bar
coachingCue: Kip from shoulders, toes touch bar simultaneously.

name: Hanging Knee Raise
coachingCue: Controlled, knees to chest, avoid swinging.

name: Dumbbell Bent-Over Row
coachingCue: Flat back, elbows drive back, squeeze at top.

name: Kettlebell Bent-Over Row
coachingCue: Hinge at hips, pull KB to hip crease.

name: Reverse Lunge
coachingCue: Step back, both knees 90°, front heel stays down.

name: Walking Lunge
coachingCue: Long stride, upright torso, alternate legs.

name: Dumbbell Walking Lunge
coachingCue: DBs at sides, tall posture, controlled step.

name: Jumping Lunge
coachingCue: Explosive split jump, land soft, switch mid-air.

name: Box Step-Up
coachingCue: Full hip extension at top, control descent.

name: Sit-Up
coachingCue: Butterfly feet, touch floor behind, reach to toes.

name: V-Up
coachingCue: Legs and arms meet at top, controlled lower.

name: Hollow Hold
coachingCue: Lower back pressed to floor, legs low, shoulders off.

name: Plank
coachingCue: Rigid body, hips level, breathe steadily.

name: Mountain Climber
coachingCue: Hips level, drive knees to chest alternately.

name: Flutter Kick
coachingCue: Lower back down, small controlled kicks, count each.

name: GHD Sit-Up
coachingCue: Controlled full extension, hands touch plate behind.

name: Box Jump
coachingCue: Full hip extension at top, step down for safety under fatigue.

name: Broad Jump
coachingCue: Arm swing, explosive hips, land with soft knees.

name: Jumping Jack
coachingCue: Full arm overhead, feet wider than shoulder on jump.

name: Skater Hop
coachingCue: Lateral bound, land on one foot, touch ground with hand.

name: Burpee
coachingCue: Chest and thighs to floor, jump with clap overhead.

name: Step-Back Burpee
coachingCue: Step feet back and forward instead of jumping, same chest touch.

name: High Knees
coachingCue: Drive knees to hip height, pump arms.

name: Bear Crawl
coachingCue: Knees hover 1 inch off floor, opposite hand-foot move together.

name: Inchworm
coachingCue: Walk hands out to plank, walk feet to hands, stand.

name: Run
coachingCue: Consistent pace, breathe rhythmically.

name: Shuttle Run
coachingCue: 5m there and back = 1 rep; touch the line each time.

name: Row (Rower)
coachingCue: Legs, body, arms — reverse on recovery. Drive with legs.

name: Assault Bike
coachingCue: Push and pull handles, drive with legs, consistent cadence.

name: Ski Erg
coachingCue: Hinge at hips, arms follow, full extension at top before pull.

name: Single-Under
coachingCue: Small jumps, wrists turn rope, land on balls of feet.

name: Double-Under
coachingCue: Slight pike, fast wrists, jump higher than singles.

name: Power Clean
coachingCue: Pull from floor, double extension, fast elbows, catch in quarter squat.

name: Squat Clean
coachingCue: Pull, extension, drop under, catch in full squat, stand.

name: Dumbbell Power Clean
coachingCue: Hinge, shrug, pull under, catch at shoulders.

name: Power Snatch
coachingCue: Wide grip, big pull, punch overhead, catch with soft elbows.

name: Dumbbell Snatch
coachingCue: One arm, hinge, shrug, pull, punch overhead, alternate each rep.

name: Handstand Hold
coachingCue: Kick up to wall, hollow body, eyes to floor.

name: Wall Walk
coachingCue: Start in push-up, walk feet up wall, nose to wall at top.

name: Ring Dip
coachingCue: Support on rings, dip below, lock out, rings turned out.

name: Farmer's Carry
coachingCue: Tall posture, tight grip, small quick steps.

name: Sandbag Carry
coachingCue: Bear hug or shoulder carry, brace core throughout.

name: Medicine Ball Clean
coachingCue: Deadlift, shrug, pull under, catch in front rack squat.

name: Medicine Ball Slam
coachingCue: Overhead, full extension, slam hard, catch on bounce.

name: Bench Press
coachingCue: Arch, retract scapula, bar to chest, press explosively.

name: Dumbbell Floor Press
coachingCue: Elbows 45°, press to lockout, lower until triceps touch floor.

name: Box Step-Over
coachingCue: Step up, stand tall on top, step down other side.

name: Rope Climb
coachingCue: S-wrap the rope with your feet, stand up tall, repeat.

name: Legless Rope Climb
coachingCue: Arms only — keep legs off the rope, pull high and reset.

name: GHD Hip Extension
coachingCue: Neutral spine, hinge at hip, squeeze glutes at top.

name: GHD Back Extension
coachingCue: Slow descent, neutral neck, extend fully without hyperextending.

name: Sled Push
coachingCue: Drive through the floor, lean into the sled, short quick steps.

name: Sled Pull
coachingCue: Face away, pull strap hand-over-hand or drag walking backward.

name: LYING DUMBBELL ROW SS SEATED SHRUG
Shoulder Raise Side and Front DB
No Leg Drive Dumbbell Chest Press
Incline Close Grip Barbell Bench Press
